facebook.caption: If you're looking for a resort that balances elegance with a genuine island feel, Cassia Cottage Resort & Spa Phu Quoc deserves a spot on your shortlist. Rated 4.6/5 across 1,378 reviews, this sophisticated property on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo offers outdoor pools, a beach bar, an on-site restaurant, and access to its own private beach area. It's the kind of place where a lazy afternoon drifting between the pool and the shoreline feels completely justified. Practical tip: book a room with a beach-facing view and head to the beach bar around sunset for the best atmosphere.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the light hit that private beach, the pool shimmering in the background, and the beach bar coming to life at golden hour. Cassia Cottage Resort & Spa Phu Quoc earns its 4.6/5 rating in every frame, a resort where the setting does most of the talking.

instagram.caption: Private beach, outdoor pools, a beach bar at sunset. Cassia Cottage Resort & Spa Phu Quoc is the kind of resort that makes it very hard to leave. Rated 4.6/5 by 1,378 guests. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, Phú Quốc.
instagram.video_caption: Pool, private beach, beach bar. Cassia Cottage Resort & Spa Phu Quoc gives you all three in one spot and the 4.6/5 rating from over 1,300 guests says it all.

tiktok.caption: Private beach, outdoor pools, and a beach bar at sunset. Cassia Cottage Resort & Spa Phu Quoc is doing a lot right. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #BeachResort #TravelTok
